creator: dch@freebsd.org
text:
Seeing as we already have https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=275838
open for upgrade, I'm closing this in favour of the initial PR, which simplifies
port upgrades mainly by removing the elixir dependency.

If there are any issues with the earlier PR has issues we can't resolve in a timely
fashion, we can use this one instead of course. Thanks for the PR!

*** This bug has been marked as a duplicate of bug 273598 ***
